## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## To reproduce

Steps to reproduce the behavior:

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Apply theme / prompt '...'
4. See error

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots (before/after) to help explain the problem.

## Environment

- OS: [e.g. macOS 14, Windows 11]
- Browser + version: [e.g. Chrome 126]
- RiceLayer version: [e.g. 0.1.0]
- Website / hostname (if shareable): [e.g. example.com]
- Preset or AI prompt used:

## Safety panel output

If a theme was rolled back, paste the Safety panel checks shown in the popup.

## Additional context

Add any other context about the problem here.
